CDR.title: CDR Process #001
CDR.about:
We are thrilled to announce that the official release of the first CDR Process album.
CDR partnered with the PRS for Music Foundation to provide unsigned, UK-based artists music performance training, one-on-one mentorship, and creative feedback on their tracks. From bringing their first WIP-track submissions to CDR at Dance Tunnel, through to track development and live performance, those selected had the opportunity to learn and develop, and then showcase their works in London.
The fruits of their work is now here!
Tracklist:
MYM - Find My Love
EVM128 - Stardust feat. Daiva
Gonzi - The Beginning Is Near
Phrij - Plaindrome
Tim Tapsell - Sp34c1al f33L1Ng
Vince Vella - Lunas
Typesun - Flowers for Ogun
James Rudie - Time Pass
Bahahs - Clouds
CDR.credits:
released January 30, 2017
MYM, EVM128, Gonzi, Phrij, Tim Tapsell, Vince Vella, Typesun, James Rudie, Bahahs

CDR.title: Dimension Sounds 2015
CDR.about:
In 2015 CDR HQ teamed up with partners Dimensions Festival to bring together a unique release which built on the previous year's 2013 & 2014 producer projects. They called for producers to use over 200 field recordings as inspiration and to build their own tracks, influenced also by the festivals programming and ethos. The result of these creations is Dimension Sounds 2015, an album of tracks made up of sounds and textures from around the world, which encapsulate the spirit and energy that befalls the Dimensions Festival every summer.
This has been a long time coming, and we thank you all for your patience!
We also have a physical vinyl release, an album sampler with K15, FYI Chris, Ben Houghton & Lismore. In stock at Juno here: bit.ly/CDRX001.
All proceeds of the physical and digital releases will go to Steve Reid Foundation and Rising Tide charities.
